possible_causes: BF operational upset; tap-hole breakthrough gas
consequences: Overheating of heat exchanger tubes; potential tube failure
existing_safeguards: Temperature transmitter with high alarm; emergency bypass damper
recommendations: Install auto-bypass with <5s response time on temperature trip; add redundant temperature sensor

possible_causes: BF banking or reduced blast conditions
consequences: Insufficient steam generation; turbine trip on low steam
existing_safeguards: Flow transmitter with low alarm; minimum flow interlock
recommendations: Add steam header backup from existing plant during low-flow events

possible_causes: Sudden load rejection; turbine trip without steam dump
consequences: Safety valve lift; potential drum damage if safety valve fails
existing_safeguards: Safety valve set at 49.5 bar; pressure transmitter with high alarm
recommendations: Install two safety valves (one as backup); add auto steam dump to atmosphere on turbine trip

possible_causes: Mechanical failure of chain conveyor; hopper blockage
consequences: ESP efficiency drop; potential hopper overflow and duct blockage
existing_safeguards: Hopper level switches; conveyor running feedback
recommendations: Add redundant screw conveyor; install vibrators on hoppers; hopper capacity for 8-hour storage

possible_causes: Hot water temperature spike; control valve failure
consequences: LiBr crystallization risk; chiller shutdown required
existing_safeguards: Generator temperature alarm; control valve with fail-close on high temp
recommendations: Install safety shutdown on generator temperature >170°C; add cooling water bypass for emergency de-crystallization

possible_causes: Feedwater pump failure; level control malfunction
consequences: Low drum level; potential tube overheating and failure
existing_safeguards: Low level alarm; feedwater pump auto-start; emergency trip on very low level
recommendations: Ensure standby feedwater pump with auto-changeover <10s; add independent low-low level trip circuit

deviation: Flue gas backflow into limestone slurry tank
possible_causes: ID fan trip; absorber pressure reversal
consequences: Slurry overflow into ductwork; corrosion damage
recommendations: Install seal loop at absorber base; add emergency drain system; pressure switch interlock on ID fan

possible_causes: Limestone quality variation; pH control drift
consequences: Off-spec gypsum unsaleable to cement industry; disposal cost
existing_safeguards: Slurry pH control; periodic gypsum sampling
recommendations: Install online gypsum moisture analyser; automated pH correction with feedback loop
